name: Doctave
description: Doctave — developer documentation platform purpose-built for software teams, with Git integration, Markdown authoring, and CI/CD preview deployments.

seo.title: Doctave — Developer Documentation / DevRel
seo.meta_description: Doctave: Doctave — developer documentation platform purpose-built for software teams, with Git integration, Markdown authoring, and CI/CD preview deployments.

when_to_use: Git-backed docs site with PR preview deployments per branch
Internal SDK documentation with Markdown authoring workflow
Versioned developer portal auto-deployed on merge to main
Dev team runbooks hosted on a self-managed docs platform
API guide with embedded code samples reviewed in GitHub PRs

pros: Git-based workflow fits engineering team habits
Fast preview deployments on every PR
cons: Smaller ecosystem than Mintlify, Readme, GitBook
Newer product means fewer case studies and integrations
review.verdict: Clean, engineer-friendly docs platform; smaller ecosystem means fewer templates and escape hatches.
review.best_for: Engineering teams that want docs-as-code with PR previews and zero-infrastructure hosting.
review.not_for: Marketing-heavy docs sites or teams needing extensive templates and non-technical editors.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription, no evidence of peak-lock
